vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"50\" height=\"60\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 50, "h": 60, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Flip-Flop Simplified" }, { "xml": vertex=\"1\"><mxGeometry height=\"10\" width=\"10\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></object></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 10, "h": 10, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "EllipseInterfacePort" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><object label=\"\" ProtoLabel=\"XM\" id=\"2\"><mxCell parent=\"1\"
